name: Journal Stamp
author: QUILL Team
description: Automatically inserts a date header when a new document is created in a journal folder, and optionally announces daily word counts after every save.

document_events.title: Insert journal date header
document_events.description: Inserts an ISO date-and-weekday header when a new document is created in a folder that looks like a journal (path contains 'journal', 'diary', or 'notes').

document_events.title: Announce word count after save
document_events.description: Speaks the document word count after every save so you always know your progress. Configurable: off, on-save, or only when a daily goal is set.

document_events.title: Announce session restore
document_events.description: Briefly announces that this document was restored from a previous session, so you know exactly where you are picking up.

document_events.title: Journal Stamp enabled
document_events.description: Runs once when the Quillin is first enabled, or when QUILL starts with it already enabled. Announces a brief activation notice so the user knows the Quillin is watching.

document_events.title: React to setting changes
document_events.description: Fires when the user changes any Journal Stamp preference. Refreshes internal configuration so the next event handler uses the latest settings.

preferences.title: Journal Stamp
preferences.description: Settings for the Journal Stamp Quillin.

tabs.title: Date Header
tabs.description: Control the format and placement of the date header inserted in new journal documents.

settings.label: Date format
settings.description: How the date is written in the inserted header line.

settings.label: Custom date pattern
settings.description: A Python strftime format string used when 'Custom strftime pattern' is selected. Example: %A, %d %B %Y produces Monday, 15 June 2026.

settings.label: Separator after header
settings.description: What follows the date header line.

settings.label: Journal folder keyword
settings.description: Comma-separated keywords. A new document triggers the header only when its file path contains one of these words (case-insensitive). Leave blank to trigger for every new document.

settings.label: Insert header on new document
settings.description: Turn off to disable automatic header insertion entirely.

tabs.title: Word Count
tabs.description: Configure the word count announcement that plays after every save.

settings.label: Announce word count
settings.description: When to speak the word count after a save.

choices.label: Only when a daily goal is set

settings.label: Daily word goal
settings.description: Target word count per day. Set to 0 to disable. When set, the announcement says how many words remain.

tabs.title: Session Restore
tabs.description: Control what is announced when a document is restored from a previous session.

settings.label: Announce session restore
settings.description: Speak a brief message when a document is restored from a crash or previous session.
